name: mdsmith
description: Markdown linter for Claude Code — LSP diagnostics, slash-command skills, a Markdown reviewer subagent, and a post-edit autofix hook

plugins.name: mdsmith-lsp
plugins.description: Inline mdsmith diagnostics and Markdown navigation

plugins.name: mdsmith-dev-lsp
plugins.description: Go and TypeScript LSP servers for mdsmith contributors

plugins.name: mdsmith-audit
plugins.description: Audit and fix Markdown file organization in an mdsmith repository

plugins.name: mdsmith-skills
plugins.description: Slash-command skills for mdsmith fix, kinds, and check

plugins.name: mdsmith-reviewer
plugins.description: Subagent that reviews Markdown PRs and drafts

plugins.name: mdsmith-autofix
plugins.description: Post-edit hook that runs mdsmith fix on .md files
